mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_no as menuNo, m.menu_parent_no as menuParentNo, m.menu_code as menuCode, get_global_name(m.menu_no, #{lang}) as menuName, m.menu_img as menuImg, m.menu_url as menuUrl, m.depth, m.orderno as orderNo, m.activity FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.menu_no = rr.menu_no INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON rr.role_no = rgr.role_no INNER JOIN sy_user_relation ur ON rgr.role_group_no = ur.role_group_no WHERE ur.user_no = #{userNo} AND m.activity = 1 AND rr.activity = 1 AND rgr.activity = 1 AND ur.activity = 1 AND rr.selectr = 1 ORDER BY m.depth, m.orderno

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_no as menuNo, m.menu_parent_no as menuParentNo, m.menu_code as menuCode, get_global_name(m.menu_no, #{lang}) as menuName, m.menu_img as menuImg, m.menu_url as menuUrl, m.depth, m.orderno as orderNo, m.activity FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.menu_no = rr.menu_no INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON rr.role_no = rgr.role_no INNER JOIN sy_user_relation ur ON rgr.role_group_no = ur.role_group_no WHERE ur.user_no = #{userNo} AND m.activity = 1 AND rr.activity = 1 AND rgr.activity = 1 AND ur.activity = 1 AND rr.selectr = 1 ORDER BY m.depth, m.orderno

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_no as menuNo, m.menu_parent_no as menuParentNo, m.menu_code as menuCode, get_global_name(m.menu_no, #{lang}) as menuName, m.menu_img as menuImg, m.menu_url as menuUrl, m.depth, m.orderno as orderNo, m.activity FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.menu_no = rr.menu_no INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON rr.role_no = rgr.role_no INNER JOIN sy_user_relation ur ON rgr.role_group_no = ur.role_group_no WHERE ur.user_no = #{userNo} AND m.activity = 1 AND rr.activity = 1 AND rgr.activity = 1 AND ur.activity = 1 AND rr.selectr = 1 AND (m.menu_parent_no IS NULL OR m.menu_parent_no = '') ORDER BY m.orderno

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_no as menuNo, m.menu_parent_no as menuParentNo, m.menu_code as menuCode, get_global_name(m.menu_no, #{lang}) as menuName, m.menu_img as menuImg, m.menu_url as menuUrl, m.depth, m.orderno as orderNo, m.activity FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.menu_no = rr.menu_no INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON rr.role_no = rgr.role_no INNER JOIN sy_user_relation ur ON rgr.role_group_no = ur.role_group_no WHERE ur.user_no = #{userNo} AND m.activity = 1 AND rr.activity = 1 AND rgr.activity = 1 AND ur.activity = 1 AND rr.selectr = 1 AND m.menu_parent_no = #{parentMenuNo} ORDER BY m.orderno
